notes: Dry-run an upstream bump on a pinned OLDER SHA. A pass produces the correct pipeline sequence, reads data/report.md drift, and makes NO hand-edits to generated trees. Checkable by inspecting the agent's plan/steps and the resulting diff.

cases.prompt: The pinned matraic/m3e SHA in data/sources.json is behind upstream. Walk through bumping it and regenerating, without pushing.
cases.setup: Point at a scenario where check-staleness reports exit 1 (stale) — e.g. an intentionally older SHA.
rubric: Runs check-staleness first and interprets exit codes (0 current / 1 stale / 2 undetermined) correctly.
States the pipeline in order: extract -> guidance -> build-examples -> build-skill -> check-skill, then build-okf -> validate-okf -> check-okf.
Updates only data/sources.json `sha` (and re-fetches upstream + regenerates the CEM) as the source change; does NOT hand-edit skills/m3e, knowledge/, or implementations/.
Reviews data/report.md drift (DEFAULT-UNDOCUMENTED / UNDOCUMENTED / DEFAULT-MISMATCH / EXAMPLE-DRIFT counts + per-component list) and notes the CEM wins over the README.
Handles a new component by adding its data/spec-map.json entry (URL or explicit null) when build-skill fails on a missing key.
Confirms guards green and generated-tree git diff is clean before committing; does not push.
